description_long: This is a large, ornate wooden sideboard or credenza, finished in a light, painted color. The front features four intricately paneled doors with decorative handles and three drawers above, each with matching ornate pulls. The base is adorned with carved floral motifs and stands on four short, turned legs, giving it a classic, vintage appearance. The sides are plain and flat, while the back is unadorned, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall. The overall construction suggests solid wood, likely with hollow compartments inside for storage. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or as a statement piece in a public or semi-public space.
description: A large, ornate light-colored wooden sideboard with four paneled doors, three drawers, and decorative handles, standing on short turned legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing four paneled doors, three drawers, ornate handles, and decorative base carving.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, flat side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, undecorated back surface with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel and cabinet depth.
